choice.title: I was told to talk to you about this pendant.
I want three more wishes... and world peace.
choice.response: So, miss dungeon, what do you really want?

choice.title: I was told to talk to you about this pendant.
I want everything you have... and world peace!
Uhh, four-twenty, what?
choice.response: Four hundred and twenty gold coins.

choice.title: Whatever, I'll just take all you have!
What do I get for all those gold coins?
choice.response: The thing that you came here for.

choice.title: How about zero gold and a broken skull?
And what might that be?
choice.response: A thread for your amulet string.

choice.title: I only need you in a pool of blood.
Oh, ok, here, take my money.
Let me think about this (leave).
choice.response: I don't have time for poor people.

choice.title: Actually, I'll just take it instead!
We're finished when I say so!
